summary:
PERSONAL EXPERIENCE AND OBEDIENCE: Brandon recounts his experience of severe hip pain and describes finding relief through what he interprets as step-by-step obedience to the voice of God, such as singing and moving his leg. He emphasizes the importance of following this inner guidance over intellectual logic, sharing a story about fixing a sprinkler in the dark. Brandon also references John Bevere's book, urging a return to foundational Christian practices and maintaining a reverent fear of God.

PROPHETIC VISIONS AND NATURAL DISASTERS: Brandon details his visions of future natural disasters, interpreting recent earthquakes off the coast of Russia as harbingers. He expresses concern over potential tsunamis affecting Hawaii, Japan, Alaska, and the American West Coast. His descriptions include predictions of devastating geological events in the Ring of Fire, including Washington, Oregon, and British Columbia. He also shares visions of Mount Fuji erupting, temples collapsing in India, and severe drought striking Australia.

GEOPOLITICAL TENSIONS AND GLOBAL CONFLICT: Brandon shares his concerns regarding international relations, specifically focusing on the ongoing conflict involving Ukraine and Russia. He advises against provoking Russia, referring to the nation as a bear that must not be backed into a corner, and expresses fears of a fragile situation that could escalate into a larger war. His narrative includes claims about the involvement of North Korea, Cuba, and various global leaders, suggesting that Australia might be reluctantly drawn into the conflict.

SPIRITUAL REVIVAL AND CALL TO SALVATION: Brandon expresses his belief in an imminent spiritual awakening, particularly emphasizing a vision of spiritual fire spreading across Africa from Angola. He shares an anecdote about his daughter experiencing a profound spiritual moment to illustrate his belief that people of all ages will be used in this movement. The narrative concludes with Brandon earnestly appealing to his audience to repent and seek a relationship with Jesus.
rawData: [July 30, 2025]-[Praying over the earthquakes]-[https://youtu.be/EkYyosFG8WU]-[Well, I'm doing this prayer video live because I was going to make a video already today for tomorrow. But after I got all the emails for the earthquake that just took place off the coast of Russia, I felt led to pray over people's protection because of the tsunami warnings that they're having. And so, I want everybody to come together, and we're just going to take authority and pray over the coastlines of Hawaii, Japan, the West Coast of the United States of America, and parts of Alaska because, you know, we have power and authority over all this stuff, folks. And so, we'll put our angels out there watching over these people. We're the salt and we're the light, and that's what our job is. And when God gives us these harbingers, these warnings through prayer telling us that they were coming... How many weeks ago? He said, "A major one is about to take place." And it did, just like the Lord told us. But it's not the one—I've seen that one up there, and then I see the one on the Oregon coastline, and it will be very devastating from what I have seen. So, we take authority and pray over the people of Oregon and over Washington because it's the Ring of Fire. And this is the pressure that I warned you all about that's coming, a shaking in the atmosphere, a shaking in the soil. And the Lord told me, He said, "Great pressure will come on the soil in the days ahead." And then there's other articles that are being sent to us about the asteroids saying, "Hey, it's going to hit the moon." Now, I thought that was kind of interesting because of what the Lord was telling me about the tides. He said, "The tides will change. There'll be unusual tides. They'll come further in than ever before." And He said, "And they'll go out further than they ever have before." He said, "Watch the tides," if you all remember. And so, these are the things that I've been praying over. And over Italy—unusual tides in Italy, over... was it Venice? Yeah, that's what the Lord was talking to me about. And so, those are the things that I've been praying over. But I can tell you what's happened in the last couple of days with me. But maybe we'll just go straight into prayer today on this video. I was going to talk about some things the Lord had for you; I guess I can go over that. He was talking about being obedient and listening to his still small voice, and that it wouldn't have to be, you know, like with body language and how you can sense whenever your spouse is upset about something. They don't have to use words. But following the voice of God so strong, following that inward peace, so that He doesn't have to speak when you're mature and you've been around somebody a long time. They don't have to say something. A lot of times, you already know what they're feeling just by how they're acting, right? And your wife, you know, you're sitting next to your wife in the car or something, and you know if there's something bothering her or not just because of her mannerisms, right? And so, that was what the Lord was talking to me about—listening to the mannerisms, listening to Him. He doesn't have to... If He's not saying something, follow that peace that passes all understanding. There's many of you... There's so much confusion, and that's why I see the emails. My wife tells me, she says, "Brandon, people are thinking they're hearing the Lord, Brandon, and they're not. They're not. There are familiar spirits that are messing with these people." And that's why I made the video today going back to the ABCs of Christianity: reading your Bible, praying, going to church, volunteering, doing the things that you've got to do. Do the ABCs, but don't just go around hearing voices. That's what I was talking about. There's a lot of people just hearing voices. They're, you know, "I hear this voice and I followed it and I did this," and I'm thinking, "Well, don't do that." You've got to test the spirits and you've got to pray in the spirit, or pray in English, whatever you know how to do. Pray, worship, get into worship. And I have this for you: I was hurting really bad in my hip. I hadn't made a video because I don't know what I did, but it was so bad I couldn't even get out of my chair. I was under attack, and it was hurting so bad I couldn't move. And so, I laid down and I couldn't even turn over in bed. It was the most excruciating pain I've ever had. And I told my wife, I said, "I might have to have you take me to the hospital because that's how bad this is." And all of a sudden, I started praying. And I was praying and praying and praying and praying. I said, "Lord, I thank you that I'm healed," and all this stuff. He said, "Stop praying and start worshiping. Start worshiping me." So, I just started singing songs, started worshiping the Father in here, and the glory of the Lord started to come. I could feel it. And in His presence, there's fullness of joy; there's fullness of peace. And I was still feeling that pain, and He said, "Move your leg." I said, "Move my leg? I'm in pain! I don't want to move my leg." He said, "Move your leg." Okay, so I moved my leg, and I lifted my leg. And all of a sudden, out of that little bit of obedience, the pain subsided a little bit. He said, "Sing." So, I started singing, and I moved my leg. He said, "Stop moving your leg. Tell Diana to sing." So, she started singing, started worshiping, and all of a sudden, that pain level went down a little bit more. I said, "Well, my goodness, this is amazing." Because I'm telling you, it was on a scale of one to 10, it was a 20. That's how bad this pain was. It was awful, and I was crying out. I said, "I need mercy right now." He said, "Sing." So, I started singing more. He said, "Lift your leg." So, I lifted my leg and I moved my leg. He said... It's just the still small voice. It's the obedience of the little thing, even if it sounds foolish. Listen. He said, "Turn your body over, get on the floor, and move yourself where you can stand on one foot and hop." I said, "Lord, I'm in excruciating pain." But I said, "Lord, I'll do it." So, I turned over out of the side of my bed and I started bouncing on the foot that didn't hurt, and the pain started lifting even more. I said, "Well, that was really interesting." And now, I was able to move a little bit so I could go to the restroom. So, He said, "Go to the restroom." So, I hobbled into the restroom, and by the time I got there, the pain lifted a little bit more. And then He said, "Now, sing more." So, I started singing more and I started worshiping the Father. "Thank you, Father. Thank you." I made it to the hall, and He said, "Walk quickly." I said, "Walk? I can barely." So, I hobbled, starting to move down the hall, and the pain lifted a little bit more. And I told her, "It's lifting." But it's as I take every single step of obedience in what He's asking me to do, even if it's not something that my flesh wants to do. I'm following the voice of God and what He's instructed me, even if it doesn't make sense. So, I get down all the way, and He said, "Now, go sit on the side of your bed again." So, all these little steps of pain that was so intense that I couldn't move... and I kept listening, I kept listening, I kept listening. And by the time it was like 1:00, whatever it was, it was terrible. Boom, it just started lifting completely. And He said, "Go to sleep." So, I went to sleep. When I woke up, it was completely gone. But what I'm trying to tell you is in the word that He gave me within that 24 hours, He said, "This is what it's going to take to walk in the greater glory." Even if it doesn't make sense what I'm instructing you to do, you just obey me even if it's painful. Do you understand? Following the voice of God beyond your intellect in these last days, even if it doesn't make sense to your natural mind. The natural man perceiveth not the things of the Lord. And in these last days, for what's about to take place, you must obey Him at all costs, even if it doesn't make sense. "Jump on one leg." "I'm in pain." "Jump on one leg." Boing, boing, boing. It lifts. I go, "Well, I'll be." And that's what He was talking to me about—obeying Him at all costs. And He gave me an illustration because I watched Billy Burke. He'll be ministering to somebody, and all of a sudden, he will get a word of knowledge for another person instantaneously. He'll turn and minister that word of knowledge that he's getting from the Father instantaneously to that other person. The other person's there, and it's awkward, and they'll be looking at him like you're rude. But he'll follow the voice of God at all costs, and the anointing follows. It flows. It's not what you think you should be doing at that moment. And the Lord showed me. He said, "It's not what you think you should be doing at the moment. It's following My voice, even if it doesn't make sense." And what we're going to come to in the days ahead, going into the fall, going into this new season, He said an acceleration of things is about to take place. You're about to see things change like you've never seen them change before. And if you want to flow with Me, you're going to have to obey Me when it doesn't make sense. And that's what He's been instructing me about. I was invited to do certain things, and it looked all beautiful, but the Lord said, "This is not peace. I'm not giving you a go on this." Well, I don't understand, Father. Isn't this the door? Isn't this what You want me to do? He said, "No, don't do this." And it's uncomfortable for your flesh, but follow what I tell you to do, even if it doesn't make sense to you. "But I'm going to show you some things concerning this." So, He gave me a download. It was a word of correction for some things. And it was so clear what the Holy Spirit was showing me. But the enemy came immediately. He's like, "Oh, you're not hearing the voice of God." It was torment. Fear has torment, but perfect love casteth out all fear. So, I'm dealing with the balance of your flesh and the spirit, because your flesh wants money, because you want the provision, you want all this stuff, and you're trying to get it, and you think, "Oh, there's money involved. This is a blessing." And the Lord said, "Reject that. Don't take that. Do what I tell you to do." And it's listening to Him at all costs, even if it doesn't make sense to your flesh. Because this individual said, "Hey, we want to bless your ministry," and it's a lot. I was like, "Oh my goodness, praise God." But the Lord said, "No, will you listen to Me even when it doesn't make sense?" Yes, Lord. Yes, Lord. So, I follow the voice of God. This is what He tells me to do, and this is what I'm trying to tell you to do. Go back to the basics. Go back to your first love. He started talking to me about the book by John Bevere, "The Awe of God". And He said there must be a reverent fear. Not like, "Oh, I'm scared of God." I'm talking about reverencing Him and being in awe of Him because of who He is. He is a God that is to be feared. And we're not giving Him enough reverence in these days. It's the still, small voice, but obeying the still, small voice even whenever it doesn't make sense, and fear Him. This is what He says to do, and it's not what your intellect thinks you should be doing. It's following Him at all costs. Awe of God. And He said, "Go back, and you need to read the book again. Read the first several chapters of John Bevere's book again. You're missing it. You need to go back to the basics of what I've told you. Don't deviate just because all this stuff's coming at you." "Hey, we have a conference for you over here. We have a conference for you over here." "What have I told you to do? Raise up prayer warriors for this time, in these end times. Bring a million-man and woman prayer army. That's your assignment. Don't deviate from it." Do you understand? And the shiny thing is really shiny, and it can distract you. What did God say? And that's what I want you to go back to in your life today, ladies and gentlemen. Go back to, what did God say? Do you have an inward peace to do for the Father on a day-to-day basis? Don't let the shiny thing distract you, because there'll be a lot of enticing things in your life that come along to try to deviate you from the plan, just because the anointing is there and people are attracted to the anointing. People get attracted to the light, and they'll have all kinds of opportunities, and there'll be money in it and all kinds of things. But what does God say? No matter how much it looks so pretty and the pig has lipstick, God said, "Don't touch it." He said, "Don't touch it." And there'll be a lot of times He'll instruct you to do things and it doesn't make sense. That's what I have for you. I pray that blessed you. But that's what He's dealing with me on. And He said, "From glory to glory, I'm changing you, changing you, changing you into His likeness and image, to perfect in me the love of God shown to the world." For He's changing me from earthly things to the heavenlies, His likeness and image, to perfect in me the love of God shown to the world. Do you understand? He's taking us from glory to glory. He's changing me. And you've got to keep doing what He's asked you to do, and at all costs. And so that's what I have. I know this is live, but it's just so raw. I'm just so real, y'all, about this kind of stuff. I might mess up, and I might say the wrong thing, but I know my heart is trying so hard to tell you what the Holy Spirit has told me today. You know, I was outside doing my sprinkler, and it was all messed up. The guy hit it with a lawnmower, and He sat out here for a minute and talked to me. So, I was out there, and I was digging a hole trying to fix the sprinkler, doing everything, just listening. And my reaction was, "Well, I'm going to go do a live. It's getting late. You told me to pray for the people." "Oh, I told you to do this, but see, it was listening to His leading immediately. I told you to take some time and fix the sprinkler." Okay, even if it doesn't make sense, we'll fix the sprinkler right now in the dark. Put the light on, just digging around. And so that's what I was doing. You know, I probably still have dirt on myself. So I changed my shirt, put it on. I was excited because I had a new shirt. I said, "I'll do a new live video for y'all with my new shirt." But it's just keeping that. Go back—I'm going to tell you again—go back to your first love. Go back to where you fell in love with Him, and get all of this. Because the Lord showed me, there was this man. He said, "This was pure before, but the more they get big in their own eyes and all the stuff, it starts to deviate." Go back to the basics. What were the prayers you prayed before you were anything? What were the prayers you prayed before you had a big church, or a big ministry, or any kind of anything? Because that's what's going to keep you. That's what's going to keep you, the more you spend time with Him and keep that freshness. Father, I just want to be used by you to do something great. I want to help you bring in the harvest. I want to help bring in the lost for Jesus today. And when you start doing it, he said, "If I be lifted up, I'll draw all men unto me." Boom. The people start coming. But you get distracted with the shiny thing, and then you've got to go back to the basics: the awe of God, the fear of God. I reverence you with holy fear. This is very important that you do this because that's where his voice is at—that still, small voice in the worship. But it's in the simple things, the ABCs; a child can do it. Last night, Diana was in her prayer time, and she goes to her secret place. Paisley came in, my little girl, and Diana was instantaneously like, "Oh, you know, I'm having my..." and the Lord said, "Suffer not the children to come to me. Let her come." So Diana said, "Honey, I'm worshiping the Father right now. I'm having my prayer time, but I'll let you come in here." And all of a sudden, the Holy Ghost and fire hit my little girl. And it was so radical that the presence of God filled our secret place, and it was fire. I'm talking, I could feel it radiating off of my little girl, and Holy Ghost tongues—it was boom. The glory of God filled my little girl like I've never seen before, to the point where it was on another level. An intercessory prayer started just out of my ten-year-old. She just started interceding for I don't know who, but it was just bubbling like a river of water just coming up out of her. And I was hearing her interceding and travailing in the spirit for whoever this was. I pray it was for me, but it was glory off this child. The presence of the Lord was on her to the point where it was amazing, the freshness, and she was smelling the fragrance just like Diana. But I'm going to tell you, in these last days, he said, "I'm going to pour out my Spirit upon all flesh." All flesh. And that's your sons, and your daughters, and your children, and your great-grandchildren. It's all hands on deck is what I'm trying to tell y'all. It's not going to be, "Well, they're an elder and, of course, they're..." He's going to use ten-year-olds, and he's going to use your five-year-olds. It's all hands on deck. This is the time for the greatest outpouring that we've ever seen before, and we're about to see the greatest harvest of souls this world has ever seen before. And the ark door is about to close. Are you on the ark? Do you know that Jesus Christ is coming with all these things? We see the tsunami that we're about to pray for, and we see the signs in the heaven that I've warned you about—this major asteroid and all these things. It's coming, and all the odds are in our favor, but it looks like the math is saying it's coming this way. And they said, "We're not going to announce all this because it will cause panic, and we have some time. Maybe it will change course." But the Lord said, "Fearful sights you will see in the days ahead that will bring you to your knees." He said, "Many things will come in the days ahead that will shake people to their core." Do you understand? It will be a great wake-up call. And I heard the church bells ringing, "Ding, ding, ding, ding." And the echo was going across the land. And as the church bells were ringing, ladies and gentlemen, there was an awakening around the land because that's what church bells do: they awaken you. They're warning signs that something major is about to happen. And that's what was happening in the realm of the spirit. The Lord said, "There's a great shaking to awaken, Brandon. Many of my people are asleep. They're like an ostrich with their head in the sand. Their eyes are fixed upon the land; they're not looking for what's coming. But I'm going to do it out of a great grace explosion—something you can't earn and something you don't deserve. Do you understand? It's grace." And God said, "I'm going to show you one great explosion of grace upon the earth one more time. One more time." And you're about to see, he said, the healings, and the demonstrations, and the manifestations of the glory are coming in a way that you've never seen before. He said, "I'm going to do something that's never been seen before. Behold, I do a new thing." And many people will say, "Well, we've seen that before. Ah, is that really God?" No, you're not going to question whether this is God or not for what's about to happen. A great travail of intercessory prayer—that's what, at first, it comes out of prayer. That's what this channel's doing. And it comes out of prayer, and then we see it in the natural. But if it's not birthed in prayer first, you're not going to see it in the natural because it has to be prayed over continually. And you get mockers, and you get all these scoffers, and you get people—they don't get it because the natural man perceiveth not the things of God because they have a carnal mind. But a great shaking is coming to you, New York. I told you, remember David Wilkerson's prophecies. A great shaking is coming to New York. A great shaking is coming to California. A great shaking is coming to Seattle. A great shaking is coming to Portland, Oregon. Remember this. He said, "The greater the blue is—the greater the blue the state is—the greater the harvest is, for I'm going to show a great grace explosion." But it is a shaking to awaken. And you'll see it in Minnesota. You're going to see it over these places. And that's why I was praying over this church called Living Word. Living Word. And he said, "I'm going to visit there with Holy Ghost and fire one last time. And it won't be like it was with the first round with the founders of the church; this will be with the sons and the daughters. It will be a great move of my presence upon this church one last time." Remember this. And you will see many elders in the days ahead. Some of them you'll say, "Oh, it's judgment. They went home." No, it's just the season. There's a time to live and a time to die; there's a time to plant and a time to reap. And you will see generals go home soon—big generals. And a lot of the people in the media, they'll say, "Oh, it's judgment. See, God's mad at them." No, it's them being called home. Not everything's about judgment. It's not because they're in sin; it's a time to live and a time to die. And that's what the Spirit of the Lord told me, and, "You must correct this." And I said, "Yes, I'll do this." I say the hard things. I say the good things. I like it when he gives me easy words. But I have an urgency of the hour to tell you, going into September, you see all the things. He said, "Watch the fig tree." What's the main thing about September? I told you it was coming before—the Lord did, not me. The Lord said, "Correct that." The Lord told me in prayer to watch September back in May. He circled it, and there was fog on it, and he said, "This is something to do with Israel." What is this? So we see Emmanuel—we see other, the UK guys said today, "We want to have... if they don't stop this, we want to recognize Palestine as a state, a two-state solution." All these things right when September... September will be the month to remember. This is what I've been praying for. A great change will start to take place, and my son always has to help me with this word, Rosh Hashanah. Thank you. I'm sorry, folks, it's the names. Rosh Hashanah—acceleration from this timeframe, an acceleration to acceleration from glory to glory, change, birthing pains. As labor pains upon a woman, so will it be when the Son of Man returns. Watch. The more we get closer to the door, the labor pains are increasing. Why? Because he's coming. He's coming. Watch the fig tree. Watch Israel. Watch this. Well, I don't agree with Bibi. I don't agree with Israel what they're doing. The people are dying in Gaza. Folks, I didn't say I agree with the administration. I'm talking about the country of Israel. I'm talking about praying for Jerusalem. I'm not talking about always agreeing with the administration, with the Democrats or Republicans or whatever. I'm talking about what the Bible says about watching the fig tree. Period. It's not about a party. It's about the land. It's about his people. It's about what God's going to do. And people get all twisted about things. I said, "We've got to come up higher. What does the Lord say? Where are we in the end-time clock?" That's why I tell you about Sister Billie's meetings, you know, at the prayer conference, and the Lord's telling me to pray over this conference. Pray—these are Moed times in the spirit realm, Brandon. These are appointed times of prayer and intercessory prayer, to intercede for the nations, to intercede for what's coming. It has to be birthed in prayer before you see it allotted in the natural. Do you understand? And most people don't get that. But I'm trying to tell you what we have to do as we see these generals get ready to go home. As we see the new Davids rise up with slingshots ready to take down the giants and the Esthers ready to go stand before the king. Are you going to be one of them? Will you allow the Lord to use you in these last days and say, "Here am I, Lord, send me. Here am I, Lord, send me"? You may not have much to work with, but "I'm available." "I may not be the smartest one in the back, but I'm available. I may not be the handsomest or the prettiest, but I'm available. If you can use this, Lord, use me." And it comes back to just that innocence of a child. "Father, I'm here, Lord." And you know what? God will take your nothing and make it into a great something. He takes the fishes and the loaves and feeds thousands, with twelve baskets of overflow. God will take your little bit of something and make it into a lot if you let him. It's all hands on deck. There's a great shaking to awaken, as you see in these earthquakes in diverse places and all the things that are going on right now. The signs of the times are all upon us. Are you watching, or is it just status quo? Is the water level rising and the pot's beginning to boil, and you don't even realize what's going on around you because you've become desensitized to the signs of the times? It's time to wake up. I have to take communion. I do not ever go over and see if he has anything because I'm not going to get snared by any devil. So I go, and I always go before his throne with communion. Thank you, Lord, I'm healed. Thank you, Lord, I'm well. And Lord, I plead the blood. I make much of the blood, and the blood makes much of me. And I apply the blood over this room. I plead the blood over my eyes, Father, if there's anything you want to show us to warn us that's coming. And if not, it's okay. We'll just keep praying anyway. But Father, I thank you, Lord, that we plead the blood over the gifts you've given us. And we thank you, Lord, that we cover ourselves in the blood right now in the name of Jesus. And we thank you, Lord, for that blood. And we thank you, Lord, that you forgive us of our sins tonight, Father. Any open doors, we shut them in the name of Jesus. And Father, I thank you, Lord, for the acceleration of the end times, and the seedtime and harvest is accelerating. And we plead the blood over our seeds, and every negative seed we've sown that we try to reap a harvest over us. Father, we thank you for mercy. We call for mercy over those seeds tonight, Father, that we don't reap a bad harvest. Father, I thank you, Lord, that we call mercy over our seeds and we plead the blood over us in Jesus' name. Amen. Amen. Right. Thank you, Lord, that we hear, we see what you want to say. We'll hear your voice, and the stranger's voice we will not follow. How many people are here? 4,100. Wow, it's late, too. They'll be going, 'You drink this water over there.'" I don't know if the company's sending it to me or whoever, but somebody sent me these waters through my Amazon. I'm trying to be a blessing for drinking. I said, "Hey, that's pretty neat. Thank you for the water." Father, we just thank you, Lord. Father, we just thank you. Father, we just humble ourselves before you. We just come before you boldly into your throne room. We thank you, Father, that you've chosen us to be in the end times. That, Father, you said there'll be a generation that doesn't taste death, Brandon, and you're that generation. That there will be a generation in these last days that doesn't taste death. And we give you all the glory. And Father, as we see these signs of the times happening all around us, Father, you said that we could take authority over things and pray for protection—that a thousand should fall at our side and ten thousand at our right hand, but nothing shall come nigh us. We plead the blood of Jesus Christ over Hawaii, over the West Coast, over Alaska, over Japan. And we say in the name of Jesus Christ of Nazareth, you will not destroy or harm any property in the name of Jesus. Waves, be still!
